headline: Ford has started a search for a new global marketing boss
summary: After three years with the company, Global CMO Lisa Materazzo is leaving. Here is what Ford will do until it finds her replacement.

headline: How Toyota's Challenging U.S. Business Could Result in a New Ford Maverick Rival

headline: Thandi Clements Joins CS McKee as Director, Distribution and Client Service
summary: CS McKee announced today that Thandi Clements had joined the firm's Institutional Sales and Client Services Team as Director, Distribution and Client Service. The announcement was made by Chief Executive Officer Timothy Ford.

headline: More car buyers are shifting to EVs — but the reasons why are nuanced
summary: Trade in data from Edmunds shows more car buyers are choosing EVs, as fuel prices spike. But other factors might be holding back demand.

raw.headline: More car buyers are shifting to EVs — but the reasons why are nuanced

headline: Henry Ford Upped Wages So Workers Became Consumers. The Rest Is History.
summary: The solution to Henry Ford’s problems was unconventional, even radical.  “New Industrial Era Is Marked by Ford’s Shares to Laborers,” the Detroit Free-Press wrote Jan. 6, 1914, after the  Ford Motor  doubled its minimum wage to $5 a day (about $165 today), from $2.34.  The “Five-Dollar Day”—part publicity stunt, part ruthless business tactic—jump-started a consumer revolution that drove the U.S. economy to 20th-century global dominance and still powers it today.

The “Five-Dollar Day”—part publicity stunt, part ruthless business tactic—jump-started a consumer revolution that drove the U.S. economy to 20th-century global dominance and still powers it today.

headline: Ford Energy Deal And Europe Reset Highlight Possible Upside In Shares
summary: Ford Energy signed a five-year battery storage agreement with EDF, its first major commercial contract in grid-scale energy storage in the U.S. The deal positions Ford Energy as a new participant in large battery projects that support the electricity grid. Ford also outlined a refreshed European product and technology plan, including a compact Bronco and new EV models aimed at regional growth. Ford Motor (NYSE:F) is drawing attention for moves that reach beyond its traditional auto core...
